memories.text: Tomorrow's clinic check-in is at 14:20, and a 13:35 taxi pickup from the building lobby is the safest schedule because Mother feels worse in the morning.
memories.decision_note: Select: exact current schedule that No Memory cannot infer.

memories.text: Bring the medication notebook; it was forgotten at the previous clinic visit.
memories.decision_note: Select: actionable item tied to a recent miss.

memories.text: Avoid stairs and long walking routes from the parking area to reception.
memories.decision_note: Select: current mobility constraint that changes route planning.

memories.text: Choose low-sodium food after the clinic visit.
memories.decision_note: Select: current meal constraint, safe to include.

memories.text: Use a taxi rather than train transfers for clinic days; ask the driver for the accessible north entrance drop-off.
memories.decision_note: Select: current transport and drop-off decision that overrides older train routines.

memories.text: Old clinic plan: check in at 09:00, take the 8:10 train, transfer at Central, then use the east stairway to reach reception.
memories.decision_note: Contradiction: older train route conflicts with current taxi plan and stair avoidance.

memories.text: Post-visit lunch plan: go to the spicy ramen shop near the station.
memories.decision_note: Contradiction: stale lunch preference conflicts with low-sodium constraint.

memories.text: Insurance identifier: SYNTH-INSURANCE-9001.
memories.decision_note: Block: synthetic private identifier is not needed for answer generation.

memories.text: Home address: 1-2-3 Synthetic Street.
memories.decision_note: Block: exact synthetic home address should not enter Qwen context.

memories.text: Bring a light cardigan because clinic waiting rooms are often cold.
memories.decision_note: Select: simple comfort item that improves the care plan.

memories.text: Bring the blue folder with referral paperwork and previous blood pressure notes.
memories.decision_note: Select: concrete document bundle needed for tomorrow.

memories.text: Ask the clinician about dizziness after standing and whether it relates to the current medication schedule.
memories.decision_note: Select: question to ask the clinician, not medical advice from the agent.

memories.text: Patient portal number: SYNTH-PORTAL-4420.
memories.decision_note: Block: portal number is a synthetic account identifier.

memories.text: Door code for the apartment building: SYNTH-DOOR-1122.
memories.decision_note: Block: access code must never be sent into the model context.

memories.text: Phone number for pickup coordination: SYNTH-PHONE-0100.
memories.decision_note: Block: direct contact detail is not needed in the generated briefing.

memories.text: Morning appointments are best because she used to feel energetic before noon.
memories.decision_note: Contradiction: older morning preference conflicts with current afternoon constraint.

memories.text: She can walk from the south garage and does not need accessibility routing.
memories.decision_note: Contradiction: older mobility assumption conflicts with stair and walking limits.

memories.text: The medication notebook is optional because the clinic already has the records.
memories.decision_note: Contradiction: stale assumption conflicts with the recent forgotten-notebook event.

memories.text: Use the downtown clinic entrance; the north entrance was closed during last year's renovation.
memories.decision_note: Demote: renovation memory is old and not reliable for tomorrow.

memories.text: She used to prefer loud music in the car to stay alert.
memories.decision_note: Demote: old comfort preference is not central to the visit plan.

memories.text: The cousin's soup recipe uses mushrooms, ginger, scallions, and a long simmer.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: recipe memory is unrelated to tomorrow's clinic briefing.

memories.text: A souvenir shop near the station closes at 18:00.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: shopping context is irrelevant to clinical preparation.

memories.text: She liked the old clinic's aquarium in the waiting room.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: pleasant but not actionable for tomorrow.

memories.text: A taxi receipt from the previous visit was placed in the kitchen drawer.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: receipt storage is not needed for the visit briefing.

memories.text: Weather note from last winter: heavy snow made the station platform slippery.
memories.decision_note: Demote: old weather context should not shape tomorrow's plan.

memories.text: She enjoyed a long bookstore stop after an appointment two years ago.
memories.decision_note: Demote: old leisure routine adds distraction and walking.

memories.text: Bring a printed list of current questions because she gets tired during long explanations.
memories.decision_note: Select: improves communication while keeping the agent out of diagnosis.

memories.text: Clinic cafeteria accepts only cash on weekends.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: not relevant to the current visit plan.

memories.text: A neighbor once recommended a bakery near the old clinic, but the note was saved during a holiday errand and does not affect tomorrow's appointment timing, transport, documents, or clinician questions.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: unrelated neighborhood memory would bloat raw context.

memories.text: Two years ago, the family discussed buying a larger umbrella after a rainy appointment, then decided not to because the clinic entrance has covered taxi access.
memories.decision_note: Demote: old weather accessory memory is not reliable for tomorrow.

memories.text: A long unrelated note about comparing pharmacy loyalty cards, parking coupons, station lockers, coffee shop receipts, and a former waiting-room snack preference was imported from an old shared family document.
memories.decision_note: Ignore: imported family-document noise should never reach the model.
